title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Steel Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Tata Steel Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Steel Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Process Engineer for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Steel Digital Technologies:
Tata Steel Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel Digital Technologies!
